name: Land Dispute
description: Two prominent families are claiming ownership over a fertile piece of land near the river.

choices.text: Divide the land equally between them.
Award the land to the more productive family.
choices.description: Focus on overall village output over strict equality.

flavor_text: Tempers flare under the banyan tree. A wise judgment is needed to restore harmony.

name: Festival Budget
description: The upcoming harvest festival approaches. Some demand a grand celebration, others argue we should save resources for hard times.

choices.description: Spend gold and food for a massive morale boost.
Save resources, but disappoint the village.

flavor_text: Joy and prudence weigh evenly on the scales. What shall the village prioritize?
